case_number: criminal acquittal appeal is dismissed in non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Acq. Appeal No. S – 101 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on MA No.7522/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 22.01.2024 Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed M. Junejo, Advocate for respondents No.2 and 3. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Panhwer, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Ali Napar, Advocate for respondents No.4 to 6. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the appellant. Diary dated 18.12.2023 shows that appellant was given a last chance; despite that, he has failed to appear and argue the case. Accordingly, this criminal acquittal appeal is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
